programmes.show_name: A Day In The Life Of Beryl Cook
programmes.show_description: A look into the world of Beryl Cook, one of Britain's most popular painters-an irreverent grandmother known for bold art featuring royal fantasies and cheeky scenes like a 'female flasher'.
Wedding bells ring for George, while warning bells ring for everyone else. Will he make it to the altar, especially now that he's chosen Dave as best man?
Unlucky in love, George turns tyrant overnight and surprises the news team with his decisiveness and strange choice of suits.
